children.heading: Reimbursements
children.label: a Reimbursements
children.text: Not later than 30 calendar days after receiving a report filed in compliance with , the Fund shall reimburse the participating State in an amount equal to 50 percent of the amount of contributions by the participating State to the reserve funds that are subject to reimbursement by the Fund pursuant to and this section. The Fund shall reimburse participating States, as it receives reports pursuant to , until available funds are expended.section 4746 of this titlesection 4746 of this titlesection 4746(a) of this title

children.heading: Size of assisted borrower
children.label: b Size of assisted borrower
children.text: The Fund shall not provide any reimbursement to a participating State with respect to an enrolled loan made to a borrower that has 500 or more employees at the time that the loan is enrolled in the Program.

children.heading: Three-year maximum
children.label: c Three-year maximum
children.text: The amount of reimbursement to be provided by the Fund to a participating State over any 3-year period in connection with loans made to any single borrower or any group of borrowers among which a common enterprise exists shall not exceed $75,000. For purposes of this subsection, “common enterprise” shall have the same meaning as in part 32 of title 12 of the Code of Federal Regulations, or any successor to that part.
75 percent of the sum of the premium charges paid to the reserve fund by the borrower and the participating financial institution; or
5.25 percent of the covered amount of the loan.
50 percent of the sum of the premium charges paid by the borrower and the participating financial institution; or
3.5 percent of the covered amount of the loan.
by applying subsection (d) to the portion of the loan, which when added to the aggregate covered amount of all previously enrolled loans equals $2,000,000; and
by applying subsection (e) to the balance of the loan.
